message:
feat(syscall): add personality, process_madvise/mrelease wrappers and migrate 6 callsites

Add syscall wrappers for personality, process_madvise, process_mrelease,
semtimedop, getcpu, clock_adjtime, and adjtimex. Migrate getdents64,
statvfs, fstatvfs, personality, process_madvise, process_mrelease.
Reduced libc::syscall count 39→33.

EPIC: bd-h5x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
